repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University concert and Sage Chapel programs
did.abstract: Programs of concerts and recitals at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection contains programs of concerts and recitals by Cornell and non-Cornell groups that took place at Cornell University. Cornell groups represented in the collection include the Wind Symphony, Chorus, Chamber Orchestra, Symphony Orchestra, Contemporary Chamber Players, Percussion Ensemble, Wind Ensemble, Cornell Jazz Festival, Cornell Glee Club and others. Also programs for Cornell United Religious Works and Sage Chapel events and services such as organ recitals and vespers.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Cornell University Dept. of Music records, #14-20-513
Elizabeth Lyman theater and concert programs, #2239

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University concert and Sage Chapel programs, #14-20-417. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
